Bailey.text:

In southeast, variable 2 to 4 becoming cyclonic 3 to 5, then southerly or southwesterly 4 to 6 later. In northwest, variable 3 or less becoming northeasterly 6 to gale 8, perhaps severe gale 9 later.
Sea state
In southeast, moderate. in northwest, moderate becoming rough, then occasionally very rough later.
Weather
In southeast, rain or showers. In northwest, rain or wintry showers.
Visibility
Moderate or good, occasionally poor.
